content.text: The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence has transformed multiple industries in the past decade. Machine learning algorithms now power recommendation systems, autonomous vehicles, medical diagnostics, and financial trading platforms. While these developments have increased productivity and opened new possibilities, they have also raised important questions about data privacy, algorithmic bias, and the future of employment. Experts predict that by 2030, AI will contribute over $15 trillion to the global economy, making it one of the most significant technological shifts in human history.
